description_long: This is a vintage-style corded telephone with a conical pink base and ornate gold metallic accents. The handset is cylindrical, also pink with gold ends, and is connected to the base by a coiled cord. The front of the base features a circular rotary dial with white and gold buttons, and the center of the dial is labeled with the word 'Chloe.' The receiver cradle is elegantly arched, supporting the handset when not in use. The phone's surface shows signs of wear, with visible scratches and scuffs, giving it a distressed, antique appearance. The overall design is decorative and eye-catching, blending retro aesthetics with a playful color palette.
description: A vintage pink and gold corded telephone with a rotary dial, ornate cradle, and coiled cord, featuring a distressed finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rotary dial, ornate gold cradle, and the handset resting on top with the coiled cord visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the circular shape of the base, the rotary dial, and the alignment of the handset and cradle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the pink conical base, the gold cradle, and the coiled cord extending from the handset.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle showing the gold and pink handset, the coiled cord, and the worn, scratched surface of the base.
